creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Jul 9, 2012 at 7:00 PM,  <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/169741'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=169741
>
>>Category:       ports
>>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>>Synopsis:       [new-port] devel/visualparadigm
>>Arrival-Date:   Mon Jul 09 17:00:22 UTC 2012

I added a second port[1] to replace the previous one. This one
redefines FETCH_ARGS to allow redirections. After contacting the
upstream project they could only provide a link that will lead to a
"302 Moved temporarily" HTTP code. I think this is the best way to
address the problem since they change the location of the package too
often.

[1] https://www.dropbox.com/s/9rdwd51qtc92lw7/visualparadigm2.shar.txt
